name: @agent-tool-lite/shell
description: Minimal Bash and PowerShell agent tools (sync spawn, timeout, cwd per call).

scripts.test: npm run build && tsc -p tsconfig.test.json && node --test test-dist/bash-tool.test.js test-dist/powershell-tool.test.js test-dist/run-shell.test.js test-dist/parse-args.test.js
